A Dunecrest Brand Eco Hospitality · UAE & GCC

Y A Q I R A
Earth Crafted.
Table Crowned.

"We sell an encouraging moment back into the bosoms of nature."

100% natural wetland grass straws — the zero-chemistry alternative for luxury hospitality. No plastic. No paper. No PFAS. Sourced from naturally occurring sedge grass wetlands, sun-dried, hand-sorted. Holds structural integrity for 2–4 hours. Biodegrades fully in 4–6 weeks. Premium pricing: AED 0.12–0.20 per straw (volume tiered).

0%PFAS — Always
4–6Weeks to Biodegrade
2–4Hours Structural Integrity
0Chemicals Used — Ever
Material Comparison

A 2023 University of Antwerp study found PFAS — linked to hormonal disruption and thyroid disease — in 90% of paper straw brands. Yaqira contains zero, because no coating is ever needed or applied.

Criteria Plastic Paper Yaqira
PFAS75% positive90% positiveZero
In LiquidMicroplastics shedCollapses <30 min2–4 hrs intact
Biodegrades200–500 yearsPFAS persists4–6 weeks

Outreach confirmed: Jumeirah Group Dubai · URB Dubai · The Fern Hotels · Sayaji Hotels

A Dunecrest Brand Authentic South Indian Spices

P.S Spices
India's Finest,
Exceptionally Curated.

Single-origin, stone-ground, zero-additive South Indian spices. Every chilli traced to Kolhapur's volcanic soil. Every turmeric root selected for medicinal potency. FSSAI certified. UAE, GCC & EU import compliant. B2B Bulk: 1kg – 25kg.

"We do not source spices. We source stories."
3%Curcumin
Guaranteed
0Additives
or Fillers
4Regional
Exclusives

Markets: Maharashtra · Mumbai · UAE · Dubai · GCC · Europe 2025–26

Lavangi Mirchi
Kolhapur, MH · GI Protected
India's most prized geographical chilli. Fierce natural heat, deep crimson. Zero artificial dye. The soul of Kolhapuri cuisine.
Turmeric Powder
South India · 3% Curcumin
Minimum 3% Curcumin declared in writing every batch. Pure medicinal-grade. Zero additives. Pharmaceutical and F&B grade.
Green Cardamom
Kerala, South India
Kerala's finest green cardamom. Intense aroma. Whole pods and powder both available. Single-origin farm sourced.
Black Pepper
South India · Export Grade
The original spice of South India. Whole and coarsely ground. Zero blending. Export grade standard.
Garam Masala
Proprietary House Blend
Balanced heat, deep aroma. Consistent batch to batch. No fillers or extenders. A benchmark proprietary blend.
Cumin & Coriander
South India · Stone-Ground
Stone-ground to preserve volatile essential oils that heat grinding destroys. Whole and ground both available.
Regional Exclusive Series

Four Coastlines.
Four Centuries of Culinary History.

Masalas available nowhere else commercially — sourced from origin communities, authenticated by elders.

01

Malvani Masala

Sindhudurg & Ratnagiri · Konkan Coast

"The fire of the Arabian Sea"

Born where the Western Ghats meets the Arabian Sea. Contains stone flower (dagad phool) — a lichen used in no other Indian blend, releasing a woody, smoky umami compound. Combined with dried coconut and Bedgi chillies; burns slowly, not sharply.

02

Goan Recheado Masala

Goa · Portuguese Colonial Heritage · Est. 1510

"The crimson soul of the Goan table"

500 years old. Made with authentic Goan palm vinegar sourced from traditional tappers — the acid medium that defines the paste. Kashmiri chilli provides brilliant colour without excessive heat. Grind only in vinegar — preserves up to one year.

03

East Indian Bottle Masala

North Konkan · Vasai, Bandra · Mumbai

"Mumbai's most guarded culinary secret"

India's most complex blend: 25–60 ingredients, sun-dried three days, hand-pounded. Contains mugwort and nagkesar (cobra saffron) — nearly impossible to find commercially. Recipe authenticated by East Indian community elders from Vasai.

04

Arabic Biryani Masala

Gulf · Yemen · Iraq · Arabian Sea Trade Route

"The fragrance of the Arabian Peninsula"

Contains authentic loomi (sun-dried Gulf lime) and high-grade Persian saffron — both sourced directly from Gulf suppliers. Loomi creates a floral, fermented sourness no fresh citrus can replicate. Spice as fragrance, not heat.

A Dunecrest Brand

Majestic
Crafted by Hand,
Chosen with Purpose.

Bespoke, handmade, zero-adulteration corporate gifting for UAE & GCC. Every candle poured by an artisan. Every hamper curated per recipient. Trusted by Ghatge Patil Industries Pvt. Ltd. and leading IT firms across Kolhapur and Pune — now extending to UAE & GCC under Dunecrest.

"Handmade. Heartfelt.
Unadulterated."

PERSONALIZED · PREMIUM · PERFECT
Kolhapur · Pune · UAE · GCC

01

Handmade Pure Candles

"Made the way candles were made before chemicals existed — natural wax, cotton wicks, pure essential oils. Nothing else."

  • 100% natural soy wax or coconut wax blend
  • Pure cotton wicks — lead-free, zinc-free, untreated
  • Natural essential oils only — no synthetic fragrance
  • Zero paraffin, phthalates, artificial dyes, lead wicks
  • Formats: Tin · Glass jar · Ceramic · Pillar · Tea-light sets
  • Fragrances: Floral · Citrus · Woody · Spiced · Oud · Frankincense
02

Bespoke Luxury Hampers

"We don't assemble from a catalogue. We design each one around who is receiving it and what your brand wants to say."

  • Wellness & Self-Care — candles, oils, teas, bath salts
  • Gourmet — Medjool dates, single-origin chocolate, dry fruits
  • Heritage & Craft — handwoven textiles, brass, ceramics
  • Modern Executive — leather, stationery, tech accessories
  • Festive: Ramadan · Eid · Diwali · Christmas · NYE
  • Packaging: Signature Box · Heritage Trunk · Eco Edit · Custom

A Dunecrest Brand Gen Z Apparel · D2C

Urban Dunes
Your Vibe,
Stitched.

Made-to-order Gen Z apparel featuring animation-culture-inspired DTF (Direct to Film) prints on 100% breathable cotton. Every piece is unique, wash-proof, photorealistic, and soft-touch. No dead stock. No overproduction. Just your vibe — stitched exactly the way you want it.

XS–5XLAll Sizes, One Price
DTFWash-Proof Prints
0Dead Stock — Ever
100%Breathable Cotton
"Made-to-order eliminates waste. Custom orders welcome — choose your hue, your print, or submit your own artwork."

Targeting the underserved premium Gen Z segment — above fast fashion, below luxury. Animation & digital art aesthetic. UAE/GCC delivery from Indian production. Available via Instagram & WhatsApp social commerce.

ASK

Dr. Aishwarya Samuel Koli

Founder & Director — Dunecrest · BDS, Career-Transitioned Entrepreneur

Trained as a dentist, Dr. Aishwarya Samuel Koli made a deliberate transition into sustainability and trading entrepreneurship — building Dunecrest from conviction, not convention. The philosophy is simple: premium quality, traceable sourcing, and products that tell a story worth paying for. Every brand under Dunecrest — from a wetland grass straw to a handmade candle to a stone-ground spice — carries that same founding belief.

Vision — 36 Months

To establish Dunecrest as a recognised multi-brand trading house in the UAE and GCC — known for bringing India's finest products to the world's most discerning markets. Yaqira on the tables of leading UAE luxury hotels. P.S Spices integrated into GCC hospitality supply chains. Majestic servicing UAE corporate clients.
